story.text: Where/how/when a gateway pulls is not a fixed arc-vs-slice choice — it is inferred per case from exemplars, bounded by the gateway's enumerated routes plus environmental policy. The whole behavior is workflow-as-code: composed from configuration, COMPILED by composition (the @-import scope-stack pattern generalized), routed through a gateway. Value: pull/route behavior is re-derived just-in-time within bounds (the inference-as-composition layer) instead of hard-coded, so route choice adapts without settling-drift while staying auditable.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
